jsonLd.title: FurnitureMart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the FurnitureMart family as a E-commerce Executive in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
